mapper.select: select * from mw_collection where collection_id = #{collectionId} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into mw_collection(user_id, type, resource_id, create_time) values (#{userId}, #{type}, #{resourceId}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: select c.resource_id, coalesce(d.name, '') as document_name, count(*) as total from mw_collection c left join mw_document d on d.document_id = c.resource_id where c.type = #{type} group by c.resource_id, d.name order by total desc limit #{size}
select user_id from mw_collection where type = #{type} group by user_id order by count(*) desc limit 1
